query:
-- فحص NAS الحالي
SELECT id, ownerId, nasname, shortname, secret, type, status, provisioningStatus, allocatedIp, createdAt 
FROM nas 
ORDER BY id;

-- فحص VPN connections
SELECT id, userId, vpnUsername, vpnPassword, serverIp, allocatedIp, status, createdAt 
FROM vpn_connections 
ORDER BY id;
